Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT (SELECT MAX("MainCurncy") FROM "OADM") AS LC, "Number", "RefDate", "Memo", "Ref1", "Ref2" FROM "OJDT" WHERE "TransId" = {?DocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX("EnbSgmnAct") FROM "CINF") <> 'Y' THEN T0."Account" ELSE LEFT(IFNULL(T1."Segment_0" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_1" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_2" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_3" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_4" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_5" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_6" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_7" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_8" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_9" || '-',''), LENGTH(IFNULL(T1."Segment_0" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_1" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_2" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_3" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_4" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_5" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_6" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_7" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_8" || '-','') || IFNULL(T1."Segment_9" || '-',''))-1) END AS Account, T1."AcctName", T0."Debit", T0."Credit", T0."FCDebit", T0."FCCredit", T0."FCCurrency", T0."DueDate" FROM "JDT1" T0 JOIN "OACT" T1 ON T0."Account" = T1."AcctCode" WHERE T0."TransId" = {?DocKey@}
